summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AnyWork marketplace application. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working correctly. Multi-step forms, navigation, search, filters, and UI components all functioning as expected.
passed_tests: Backend API - Get helpers with filters (200)
Frontend - Landing page loads with hero and CTAs
Frontend - Available helpers section shows sample helpers
Frontend - Search functionality and navigation to browse page
Frontend - Browse helpers page with filters and view toggles
Frontend - Map view and list view toggle functionality
Frontend - Helper profile page with tabs and booking options
Frontend - Post job multi-step form (4 steps) navigation
Frontend - Become helper multi-step form (5 steps) navigation
Frontend - Authentication page with login/signup tabs
Frontend - All data-testid attributes present for testing
Frontend - Responsive design and UI components
Frontend - Form validation and step progression
